source(output(
		last_name_score as integer,
		master_data_source as string,
		match_code as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date,

		master_name_first_middle as string,
		master_province as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		first_name_score as integer,
		master_gender as string,
		master_city as string,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		conflict_flg as string,
		master_row_id as string,

		match_confidence_factor as integer,
		phn as string,
		master_street_addr2 as string,
		phone_number as string,
		master_street_addr1 as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		mark as short
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT 	 P1.[patient_master_stg_id] 	 ,P1.[row_id] 	 ,P1.[stage_id] 	 ,P1.[row_score] 	 ,P1.[hosp_patient_nbr] 	 ,P1.[phn] 	 ,P1.[phn_clean] 	 ,P1.[name_first] 	 ,P1.[name_first_middle] 	 ,P1.[first_name_score] 	 ,P1.[name_last] 	 ,P1.[last_name_score] 	 ,P1.[birth_date] 	 ,P1.[gender] 	 ,P1.[aka_name] 	 ,P1.[street_addr1] 	 ,P1.[street_addr2] 	 ,P1.[city] 	 ,P1.[province] 	 ,P1.[postal_code] 	 ,P1.[phone_number] 	 ,PP.patient_status 	 ,P1.[data_source] 	 ,P1.[dupe_count] 	 ,P1.[julian_month] 	 ,P1.[patient_nbr] 	 ,P1.[master_row_id] 	 ,P1.[master_phn] 	 ,P1.[master_name_first_middle] 	 ,P1.[master_name_last] 	 ,P1.[master_birth_date] 	 ,P1.[master_gender] 	 ,P1.[master_street_addr1] 	 ,P1.[master_street_addr2] 	 ,P1.[master_city] 	 ,P1.[master_province] 	 ,P1.[master_postal_code] 	 ,P1.[master_phone_number] 	 ,P1.[master_data_source] 	 ,P1.[mark] 	 ,P1.[match_code] 	 ,P1.[match_confidence_factor] 	 ,P1.[conflict_flg] 	 ,P1.[dss_create_dt_tm]    FROM 	 [ecms].[tmp_patient_master_stg1] P1 	 INNER JOIN [ecms].[tmp_patient_prep] PP 	   ON P1.row_id=PP.row_id',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcptmasterstg1	source(output(
		birth_date as date,
		gender as string,
		row_id as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		name_first as string,
		name_last as string,
		aka_name as string,
		row_score as integer,
		julian_month as short,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		city as string,
		province as string,
		postal_code as string,
		phone_number as string,
		data_source as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		master_row_id as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		master_name_last as string,
		master_birth_date as date,
		master_gender as string,
		master_street_addr1 as string,
		master_street_addr2 as string,
		master_city as string,
		master_province as string,
		master_postal_code as string,
		master_phone_number as string,
		master_data_source as string,
		first_name_score as integer,
		dupe_count as short,
		mark as integer,
		original_match_code as string,
		new_match_code as string,
		last_name_score as integer,
		phn_clean as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT    tpms.row_id   ,tpms.hosp_patient_nbr   ,tpms.phn   ,tpms.phn_clean   ,tpms.name_first_middle   ,tpms.first_name_score   ,tpms.name_first   ,tpms.name_last   ,tpms.last_name_score   ,tpms.birth_date   ,tpms.gender   ,tpms.aka_name   ,tpms.row_score   ,tpms.dupe_count   ,tpms.julian_month   ,tpms.patient_nbr   ,tpms.street_addr1   ,tpms.street_addr2   ,tpms.city   ,tpms.province   ,tpms.postal_code   ,tpms.phone_number   ,tpms.data_source   ,null as [mark]  ,\'A\' as original_match_code   ,tpms.match_code  as new_match_code   ,140003 as stage_id /*stage_id*/   ,tpms.row_id as master_row_id   ,tpms.name_last as master_name_last   ,tpms.birth_date as master_birth_date   ,tpms.gender as master_gender   ,tpms.name_first_middle as master_name_first_middle   ,tpms.street_addr1 as master_street_addr1   ,tpms.street_addr2 as master_street_addr2   ,tpms.city as master_city   ,tpms.province as master_province   ,tpms.postal_code as master_postal_code   ,tpms.phone_number as master_phone_number   ,tpms.data_source as master_data_source FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_master_stg1] tpms WHERE  tpms.phn_clean IS NULL        AND tpms.match_code IN (\'B\',\'C\');',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcptmasterstg1bc	source(output(
		birth_date as date,
		gender as string,
		row_id as string,

		last_name_score as integer,
		phn_clean as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT    A.row_id   ,A.hosp_patient_nbr   ,A.phn   ,A.phn_clean   ,A.name_first_middle   ,1 as first_name_score   ,A.name_first   ,A.name_last   ,1 as last_name_score   ,A.birth_date   ,A.gender   ,A.aka_name   ,1 as row_score   ,CAST(1 as smallint) as dupe_count   ,A.julian_month   ,A.patient_nbr   ,A.street_addr1   ,A.street_addr2   ,A.city   ,A.province   ,A.postal_code   ,A.phone_number   ,A.data_source   ,NULL as [mark]   ,\'B\' as original_match_code   ,\'C\' as new_match_code   ,140003 as stage_id /*A.stage_id*/   ,A.master_row_id   ,B.master_birth_date   ,B.master_city   ,B.master_data_source   ,B.master_gender   ,B.master_name_first_middle   ,B.master_name_last   ,B.master_phone_number   ,B.master_postal_code   ,B.master_province   ,B.master_street_addr1   ,B.master_street_addr2 FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] A   INNER JOIN [ecms].[tmp_patient_alternate_set] B 	ON A.master_row_id=B.master_row_id 	   AND B.original_match_code=\'B\' WHERE  A.[mark]=1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcptstg2marked	source(output(
		birth_date as date,
		gender as string,
		row_id as string,

		mark as integer,
		original_match_code as string,
		new_match_code as string,
		last_name_score as integer,
		phn_clean as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT   row_id   ,hosp_patient_nbr   ,phn   ,phn_clean   ,name_first_middle   ,1 as first_name_score   ,name_first   ,name_last   ,1 as last_name_score   ,birth_date   ,gender   ,aka_name   ,1 as row_score   ,dupe_count   ,julian_month   ,patient_nbr   ,street_addr1   ,street_addr2   ,city   ,province   ,postal_code   ,phone_number   ,data_source    ,null as [mark]  ,\'B\' as original_match_code   ,\'C\'  as new_match_code   ,140003 as stage_id /*stage_id*/   ,row_id as master_row_id   ,name_last as master_name_last   ,birth_date as master_birth_date   ,gender as master_gender   ,name_first_middle as master_name_first_middle   ,street_addr1 as master_street_addr1   ,street_addr2 as master_street_addr2   ,city as master_city   ,province as master_province   ,postal_code as master_postal_code   ,phone_number as master_phone_number   ,data_source as master_data_source FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] WHERE  [mark] IS NULL',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcptstg2notmarked
